name: Foldable Workspace Dock
detailDescription: Compact, modular and built for productivity wherever you work.

name: Travel Water Bottle
description: Insulated travel bottle with carry handle, secure locking lid, and all-day temperature retention.
functions: Vacuum insulation for hot or cold beverage retention
Portable carry handle for travel and outdoor convenience
Leak-resistant locking lid for commuting and movement
Clean matte finish suitable for gift and lifestyle retail
detailDescription: This insulated travel water bottle is a practical SKU for lifestyle, commuting, and travel categories. The secure handle-top lid and streamlined matte body give it a premium look, while the durable insulated construction makes it suitable for everyday carry, road trips, and light outdoor use.

name: Car Seat Organizer Bag
description: Backseat organizer with multiple pockets for tablets, bottles, tissues, cables, and daily car essentials.
functions: Multi-pocket storage for daily travel accessories
Keeps tablets, phones, and tissues within reach
Hanging seat-back installation for quick setup
Helps reduce backseat clutter for family and ride-share use
detailDescription: This car seat organizer bag is built for practical everyday vehicle storage. Its layered pocket layout supports tablets, tissue packs, drink bottles, charging cables, and personal accessories, making it a good fit for family travel, ride-share use, and organized commuting.

specs.Features: Tissue Slot + Bottle Holder + Tablet Pocket

name: Trekking Poles
description: Adjustable trekking poles with ergonomic grips, quick-lock sections, and trail-ready stability support.
functions: Adjustable height for different users and terrains
Ergonomic grip with wrist strap for hiking comfort
Section locks for stable setup during mountain use
Improves balance and joint support on uneven trails
detailDescription: These trekking poles combine lightweight portability with dependable support for active outdoor use. The adjustable structure and ergonomic grip make them easy to carry, simple to use, and well suited to travel, walking, and weekend adventure routines.
